title: Component Showcase — Preline-Inspired Components
seo_description: Demo page showcasing 19 composable page builder components — testimonials, team, contact, pricing, gallery, before/after, service menus, and more.

props.text: 16 composable components now available for your page builder.

props.title: Preline-Inspired Components
props.subtitle: A showcase of 6 new composable page builder components — testimonials, team sections, contact forms, pricing comparisons, logo marquees, and store locators.

props.heading: What Our Clients Say
props.subheading: Hear from businesses that transformed their online presence.

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.text: The page builder completely changed how we present our brand. We went from a generic template to a stunning custom site in hours, not weeks.

testimonials.name: Marcus Johnson
testimonials.text: We've tried every website builder out there. This is the first one that actually feels like it was designed for agencies. The component library is incredible.

testimonials.name: Dr. Emily Rodriguez
testimonials.text: As a dental practice, we needed something professional but easy to update. The booking wizard and contact section alone saved us thousands.

testimonials.name: David Park
testimonials.text: The dark mode support and theming system is exactly what we needed. Every component looks polished right out of the box.

testimonials.name: Lisa Thompson
testimonials.text: We switched three of our client sites over in a single weekend. The composable architecture means we never start from scratch.

props.heading: Grid Layout Variant
props.subheading: The same testimonials rendered in a 3-column grid.

props.heading: Built for Scale
props.subheading: Every component is designed to handle real business data, not just demo content.

features.heading: Composable Architecture
features.description: Mix and match any component on any page. Every piece works independently but looks cohesive when combined. No lock-in, no rigid templates.

stats.label: faster builds
stats.description: Compared to custom-coded pages from scratch

stats.label: components
stats.description: And growing — new components added weekly

stats.label: dependencies
stats.description: Pure Tailwind CSS, no external UI libraries

features.heading: Dark & Light Mode
features.description: Every component ships with full dark and light mode support. One prop toggles the entire page. Brand colors cascade automatically via CSS variables.

quote.text: The theming system saved us weeks of design work. We just set our brand colors and everything looked right.
quote.author: Sarah Chen

props.heading: Choose Your Protection
props.subheading: Select a coverage plan that works for you. You can change this anytime.

plans.name: Premier
plans.description: Maximum protection with zero stress. Covers everything including windshield and tires.

plans.name: Standard
plans.description: Solid coverage for most situations. Covers collision and comprehensive with a small deductible.

plans.name: Minimum
plans.description: Basic liability coverage. You're responsible for damage to the vehicle up to its value.
